page_title: Type 3 Kiryū (Kai) EVA Unit-02 Color Ver.
text:
is a mecha in the Godzilla vs Evangelion collaboration series. It was based on the Mechagodzilla Type 3 (Kai) featured in the film '. It uses the colors of the Evangelion Production Model-02. https://evaglobal.jp/en/plastic-model/eva-godzilla002/ 

Profile

See complete profile at Godzilla Wikia.

Development

On 01 June 2016, it was announced by Bandai that a 32 cm toy named https://web.archive.org/web/20230924113053/https://p-bandai.jp/item/item-1000104836/?rt=pr would be released in November 2016, costing 29,160 yen (tax included). https://www.atpress.ne.jp/news/104407 

An exclusive PS, ABS, PVC plastic model with a total height of 240mm made by Aoshima named was sold at EVA GLOBAL store. It was announced on 21 September 2021 to be sold in June 2022. It was initially set at the price of 13,500 yen (tax excluded). https://www.eva-info.jp/15099 

It was featured in the game Godzilla Battle Line on the Godzilla X EVA: Tokyo Battle event on 17 March 2023 as a skin to Type 3 Kiryū (Kai).

On 23 December 2023, it was also featured as part of the [PC11] BS Premium Card Set Godzilla vs Evangelion in the Battle Spirits collaboration. http://en.battlespirits.com/product/p-cardset/pc11.php 

On April 2024, it was announced by Bandai, that a soft vinyl PVC figure (165mm x W approx. 105mm x D approx. 185mm) named was going to be sold for 4,950 yen. The release date was September 2024. https://toy.bandai.co.jp/topics/detail/3620/?c=godzilla https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gC7009307/ 

A super deformed soft vinyl 4cm figure was made by PLEX and released on October 2025 as part of GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION Mini Sofvi Chronicle line, it also had a clear color with glitter variation. 

Based in the 2023 / HYPER MODELING set, two miniature figures were used: Godzilla Against Mechagodzilla Mechagodzilla (2002) MFS-3 Type 3 Kiryū and Godzilla: Tokyo S.O.S. Mechagodzilla (2003) MFS-3 Type 3 Kiryū (Kai). https://artspirits.biz/products53.html 

Produced as a miniature of 9cm, as part of the Gekizo Series / HYPER MODELING, it was modeled by 渡辺結樹 (G-tempest) with coloring by 下村広泰 and 増島凪冴. Each figure was sold for ¥3,278 (Including tax) and the box set for ¥13,112 (Including tax). It was released in June 2026. https://artspirits.biz/products70.html 

A limited edition with metallic colors was sold in GODZILLA STORE, Premium Bandai, Tokyo Figure, and the official Art Spirits online shop. https://artspirits.biz/products71.html
